rows:
CHANGED NAME SERVER OBJECT - An object
maintained by the Name Server has changed state for the
port, area or domain indicated by the affected Port_ID.

CHANGED PORT ATTRIBUTE - An internal state of the
port specified by the affected Port_ID has changed. The
change of state is identified in a protocol specific manner.

CHANGED SERVICE OBJECT - An object maintained by
the service identified by the well-known address contained
in affected Port_ID has changed state. This Event
Qualifier value shall not be used by services accessed
through N_Port_ID that are not well-known addresses.

CHANGED SWITCH CONFIGURATION - Switch
configuration has changed for the area or domain
specified by the affected Port_ID.

REMOVED OBJECT - The port, area or domain indicated
by the affected Port_ID is no longer accessible on the
Fabric.
